description_short: Firm orthopedic mattress designed to support proper spinal alignment with breathable Pinhole Tech Latex and Aeroflow Transition Foam.

proprietary_tech.name: Pinhole Tech Latex
proprietary_tech.description: Allows constant airflow, preventing heat and moisture busupportup.

faq_specs.question: Is latex good for back pain?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. Latex is naturally firm and responsive, which helps maintain proper spinal alignment.

faq_specs.question: What is the height of the Latex Ortho mattress?
faq_specs.answer: Available in heights of 152 mm (6 inches), 203 mm (8 inches).

faq_specs.question: What materials are used in the construction of this mattress?
faq_specs.answer: The mattress consists of Pinhole Tech Latex, Aeroflow Transition Foam, and High Density Foam.

faq_specs.question: What is the warranty period of this mattress?
faq_specs.answer: The mattress comes with a 10-year warranty.

notes_observed: FAQ mentions 6" and 8" height options but dimensions_by_size on page only showed 152mm (6"). 8" SKU may exist as variant — confirm in compare page.
